title: Strategies to enhance collaborative research for increased production and productivity of CLAN Mandate Crops
abstract: The Country Coordinators Meeting are now organized every  year to encourage and facilitate increased interaction among CLAN Country Coordinators and to monitor the progress of collaborative research activities within and across the member countries. The meeting is also useful in charting future course of action with appropriate changes if any Summary of paper presented at the CLAN Country Coordinators Steering Committee Meeting, 24-28 November 1997, Batu Malang, Indonesia have been compiled for ready reference to the interested researchers and research administrators. The summary of discussions and minutes of the CLAN Steering Committee are also inculded
